Peter,

How would you like to get...
1. **A free flight to New York City;**
2. **A private tour of our campaign headquarters at Trump Tower;** and
3. **A lunch with me - **where we'll talk about our strategy to defeat Hillary Clinton and Make America Great Again!

[**Just contribute $3 now to automatically enter for a chance to win it all.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36868931:WQNJEOYNI:m:1:1155937413:623F2AF4D921E78709010653C90C5281:r)

Ever since my father officially accepted the Republican nomination for president, our campaign has surged with momentum, and more and more Americans are joining the Trump Train to help us win.

And right now is the perfect time for you to sign on.

Your contribution will push us closer to victory. And you will also get the chance to have an insider's look at the Trump-Pence HQ in the heart of Manhattan and provide YOUR feedback on our campaign.

[**Contribute $3 to automatically enter to win.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36868931:WQNJEOYNI:m:1:1155937413:623F2AF4D921E78709010653C90C5281:r)

I'm sure Hillary Clinton's campaign is setting up fundraisers with high-powered lobbyists as we speak. But those are the people who have rigged the economy against you, left our borders wide open, and refuse to take the threat of Radical Islam seriously.

Those are the people my father wants nothing to do with. [**His campaign is about you, and that 's why I hope you will take action today.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/36868931:WQNJEOYNI:m:1:1155937413:623F2AF4D921E78709010653C90C5281:r)

I'll be happy to meet you and hear your thoughts on our campaign one-on-one.

Thanks - good luck!

Eric Trump

body:
MCGINTY DISPATCH
Frontline news from Katie McGtiny & the race for PA

Welcome to the McGinty Dispatch, our brand new newletter to keep people like you in the loop with the latest information from the field.

NEW VIDEO: "WE ARE"

With 101 days left, Katie addressed thousands of supporters in her hometown of Philadelphia. Watch our brand new video called "We Are."

Watch now: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9TQfcFCTdZk

KATIE ON INSTAGRAM

We're on Instagram! Follow @katiemcgintyforPA now to keep up with all the behind-the-scenes action.

Follow Katie: https://www.instagram.com/katiemcgintyforpa/

SAY YOU'RE IN

Politico identified six key battleground states - including Pa - that we need to win to take back the Senate. Say you're in for the fight.

Politico "The fate of the Senate majority lies in the hands of candidates scattered across the battleground map."

Say you're in: http://www.grassrootsforchange.com/flipthesenateja?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=flipthesenate

WHY ARE YOU TEAM KATIE?

"Katie will fight for me as a single mother, and for my children, and for the future of our planet!" - Marianne S.

Tell us your reason: http://katiemcginty.com/testimonial/

Days until the Election 93

Contribute now: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160807&refcode2=e20160807&amount=25

body:

Republican candidates across the country.

Peter, in case you missed it,
Gov. John Kasich spoke with CNN's Jake Tapper on 'State Of The
Union' about how he's working to support Republican candidates
across the country, his criticism of Hillary Clinton, and his
thoughts about the Obama Administration's $400 million payment to
Iran. You can watch the interview (here).

Gov. Kasich also traveled to
Illinois this past week to campaign in support of Senator Mark
Kirk and IL House Minority Leader Jim Durkin.

It's critical that we do what we
can to maintain our majorities in the U.S. Senate/House and Gov.
Kasich will continue to travel around the country this year to
support Republican candidates.

Finally, we wanted to wish all of
our American athletes good luck at this year's Olympic Games and
a special shout out to Ohio's 13 athletes competing in Rio!

Thank you.

-Team Kasich

subject: He may still beat me, Peter
body:
Unqualified and unfit | Peter --

This week, we learned that Donald Trump and the Republicans raised more than $82 million in the month of July.

This is the same man who mocked a disabled reporter and has called women “fat pigs.” The same man who took the stage at the Republican National Convention and told the world that his vision is to build a wall between the United States and Mexico, deport millions of immigrants, and repeal the Affordable Care Act, leaving countless Americans without health care.

He’s unqualified and unfit to lead our country -- but the unfortunate reality we must confront is that he still might be able to win if he spends enough to convince voters otherwise.

This team has what it takes to defeat him -- I know that. name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: What I love about making calls
body:
| Hi, Peter! I’m Bob (nice to meet you) -- and I’m part of the team of volunteer callers reaching out to potential Hillary voters around the country.

One-on-one conversations are the best possible way to make sure people show up to vote -- but I know you don't always have time to knock on doors in your neighborhood or even attend a phone bank. That’s why Hillary’s campaign built an amazing tool that allows you to make calls for Hillary right from home, on your own schedule, from your bed or even your bathtub -- all you need is a computer and a phone.

**[I’m so glad you signed up to make some calls -- we need all the help we can get to make sure Hillary wins this election. Want to give it a try right now? Just three calls will make a huge difference.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYxNzU4NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMjY0MjQ5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’ve supported Hillary since 2008 -- she’s a huge inspiration to me personally, and watching her get back up after being knocked down again and again instilled a fighting spirit in me that has changed my life forever. I was thrilled to see her dust herself off and enter the 2016 race for a second try -- but as I learned from the 2008 campaign, it’s not enough to just cheer from the sidelines.

This year, I knew I had to become involved any way I could, so I logged in, read through the script a couple of times and began making calls to voters. I love how easy the tool makes it to make a difference -- you have all the information you need right at your fingertips, so all you have to bring is your excitement to help Hillary win.

Peter, I couldn’t have imagined how gratifying it would be to speak to voters and volunteers -- you never get over how great it feels to help someone find their polling location or get registered so they can make their voice heard. My most memorable call was helping an elderly woman send in her ballot for the first time in her life! It felt great knowing that because I invested a little bit of my time, that woman would be a voter in this election.

I’m so honored to be a part of this great team that will propel Hillary to the White House -- but we need even more hands on deck to reach every voter across the United States, which is why I hope you’ll give the call tool a chance. **I've made so many connections and friendships that I would have never had if it weren't for that one day I decided to create my account to make calls for Hillary -- and you could, too! Peter, will you join me?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYxNzU4NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMjY0MjQ5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Bob

Robert Turner
New Jersey Volunteer

clean_body: | Hi, Peter! I’m Bob (nice to meet you) -- and I’m part of the team of volunteer callers reaching out to potential Hillary voters around the country. One-on-one conversations are the best possible way to make sure people show up to vote -- but I know you don't always have time to knock on doors in your neighborhood or even attend a phone bank. That’s why Hillary’s campaign built an amazing tool that allows you to make calls for Hillary right from home, on your own schedule, from your bed or even your bathtub -- all you need is a computer and a phone. I’ve supported Hillary since 2008 -- she’s a huge inspiration to me personally, and watching her get back up after being knocked down again and again instilled a fighting spirit in me that has changed my life forever. I was thrilled to see her dust herself off and enter the 2016 race for a second try -- but as I learned from the 2008 campaign, it’s not enough to just cheer from the sidelines. This year, I knew I had to become involved any way I could, so I logged in, read through the script a couple of times and began making calls to voters. I love how easy the tool makes it to make a difference -- you have all the information you need right at your fingertips, so all you have to bring is your excitement to help Hillary win. Peter, I couldn’t have imagined how gratifying it would be to speak to voters and volunteers -- you never get over how great it feels to help someone find their polling location or get registered so they can make their voice heard. My most memorable call was helping an elderly woman send in her ballot for the first time in her life! It felt great knowing that because I invested a little bit of my time, that woman would be a voter in this election. I’m so honored to be a part of this great team that will propel Hillary to the White House -- but we need even more hands on deck to reach every voter across the United States, which is why I hope you’ll give the call tool a chance. I've made so many connections and friendships that I would have never had if it weren't for that one day I decided to create my account to make calls for Hillary -- and you could, too! Peter, will you join me? Thank you, Bob Robert Turner New Jersey Volunteer | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). He's showing no sign of stopping | Peter --

He’s called her the devil. He’s decided she is a founding member of ISIS.

| Friend -- We already knew Marco Rubio opposes a woman's right to choose, even in cases of rape or incest. But yesterday, he took it a step further: he said a woman does not have the right to an abortion, even if she is infected with the Zika virus and has reason to believe her baby will be born with severe microcephaly.

**This is shocking.** Zika is most dangerous for women who are pregnant or thinking of becoming pregnant, yet Marco Rubio still opposes a woman's right to make her own health decisions.

[**Let 's send Marco a message, loud and clear. Add your name to stand with me for a woman's right to choose.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cbe/738133e4/37149a84/7f82e862/4217806653/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160807/?subsource=ngpattre160807")

And let's not forget -- the GOP majority in Congress left for summer recess before approving a bill with funding for the Zika crisis.

Florida women need a fighter who will stand up for their right to choose and who is committed to getting our state the critical funding needed to fight this virus. **It's clear that Marco Rubio will always put his ideology above women 's health care -- and we deserve better.**

[**Sign here to tell Marco Rubio: a woman always has the right to make her own healthcare choices, and politicians shouldn 't stand in the way.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cbe/738133e4/37149a84/7f82e862/4217806653/VEsF/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160807/?subsource=ngpattre160807")

Thank you,
Patrick |
